header.title: Getting Started with Digital Marketing
header.description: Set up your digital marketing admin workspace and learn the core concepts.

sections.title: Platform Overview
sections.content: Understand the digital marketing admin interface and how it connects to your content strategy across social media platforms and email campaigns.

sections.title: Platform Management
sections.content: Configure and manage your presence on Google, Facebook, LinkedIn, and Twitter. Each platform has unique best practices and templates.

sections.title: Content Strategy
sections.content: Define editorial guidelines, track content metrics, plan distribution channels, and maintain a content calendar.

sections.title: Analytics & Reporting
sections.content: Monitor performance metrics, track engagement, and measure ROI across all digital channels.
